meaning: n.负荷,重担,装载量,工作量,负载,加载vt.装载,装填,使担负vi.装货,装弹药,装料
examples: He talks such a load of piffle.
You're talking a load of crap !
Our list consists of no-load diversified U.S. equity funds with the best records since March 2000.
The obvious gambit is laundry duty, and sneaking out in a load of sheets.
